title: Entry Frontend Engineer
description: Help build the next generation of Vercel's developer dashboard. You'll work with senior engineers on a modern Next.js + TypeScript stack, ship features behind feature flags, and own pieces of our design system end-to-end.
responsibilities: Build polished, accessible UI in React and TypeScript
Collaborate with design on motion, interaction, and component APIs
Write tests and instrument features with product analytics
requirements: 1+ year of professional frontend experience
Strong fundamentals in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Familiarity with React, TypeScript, and Git

title: Mid-Level Backend Engineer
description: Own backend services that power Stripe's payments platform. You'll design APIs, scale Postgres, and partner with infra to keep things fast as we move billions of dollars of payments per quarter.
responsibilities: Design, build, and operate Go services in production
Improve reliability, observability, and performance
Mentor newer engineers via code review and design docs
requirements: 3+ years of backend experience in Go, Java, or similar
Comfortable with Postgres, message queues, and gRPC
Track record of shipping reliable services at scale

title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer
description: Lead the platform team building Cloudflare's edge network. You'll set the technical direction for compute, networking, and developer tooling across hundreds of points of presence.
responsibilities: Design and operate multi-region compute clusters
Build internal platform tooling that engineers love to use
Lead incident response and post-mortems for the platform
requirements: 5+ years operating production infrastructure at scale
Deep experience with Kubernetes, Terraform, and AWS or GCP
Strong systems fundamentals (Linux, networking, storage)

title: Staff AI Engineer
description: Define the technical strategy for OpenAI's applied research org. Drive the architecture behind our agent runtime, evals, and inference stack — and help recruit a world-class team along the way.
responsibilities: Set direction for our LLM training, evals, and serving infra
Lead technical design across multiple squads
Partner with research to ship state-of-the-art models in prod
requirements: 7+ years of engineering experience, including ML systems
Hands-on experience with PyTorch, distributed training, and inference
Demonstrated ability to lead complex technical efforts

title: Senior Staff Security Engineer
description: Own Palantir's product security strategy across cloud, application, and identity. You'll partner directly with the CTO on the security roadmap and lead the team that keeps our customers safe.
responsibilities: Set the multi-year security architecture and roadmap
Lead threat modeling, audits, and incident response
Mentor and grow a small, senior security team
requirements: 10+ years of security engineering experience

responsibilities: Lead threat modeling, audits, and incident response
Drive AppSec roadmap and incident response
Mentor and grow a small, senior security team
requirements: Eagerness to learn and grow under mentorship
Familiarity with Git and modern dev workflows
Strong fundamentals in data structures and algorithms

title: Mid-Level Frontend Engineer
description: Architect frontend systems and component libraries. Set the bar for performance, accessibility, and polish across the product.
responsibilities: Build polished, accessible UI in React and TypeScript
Collaborate with design on motion, interaction, and component APIs
Mentor mid-level engineers and review designs
requirements: Track record of shipping reliable production systems
Strong written and verbal communication
Comfortable owning features end-to-end

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Own backend services that power our core platform. Design APIs, scale Postgres, and partner with infra to keep things fast at scale.
responsibilities: Participate in on-call rotations once ramped
Write integration tests and improve reliability
Mentor newer engineers via code review and design docs
requirements: Track record of shipping at scale
5+ years of senior-level engineering experience
Strong design instincts and engineering taste

title: Staff Infrastructure Engineer
description: Design the next generation of our compute substrate. You’ll lead initiatives across Kubernetes, observability, and developer tooling.
responsibilities: Improve observability and SLOs across services
Drive capacity planning and cost optimization
Lead incident response and post-mortems for the platform
requirements: Strong cross-functional collaboration skills
Excellent design and code review skills
Track record of high-impact platform or product work

title: Senior Staff Product Engineer
description: Build features that customers love. You’ll partner closely with design and product on flows, experiments, and analytics-driven iteration.
responsibilities: Partner closely with design and PM on product direction
Lead end-to-end on product features
Raise the quality bar across product engineering
requirements: 10+ years of engineering experience
Strong mentor of senior and staff engineers
Demonstrated ability to influence org-wide technical direction

title: Entry Full Stack Engineer
description: Ship across the stack — from Postgres queries to React components. Own features end-to-end on a modern TypeScript codebase.
responsibilities: Lead architecture across editor, sync, and backend
Partner closely with design and PM on product direction
Ship full-stack features in TypeScript and Node.js
requirements: Eagerness to learn and grow under mentorship
Familiarity with Git and modern dev workflows
Strong fundamentals in data structures and algorithms

3+ years of professional engineering experience
